Ripple USD (RLUSD) has officially launched in full-scale deployment across both the XRP Ledger and Ethereum, driving a massive influx of institutional capital into the ecosystem.[1]

signals.headline: SEC Legal Battle Resolution | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
SEC Legal Battle Resolution | YES | HIGH confidence**

The long-standing SEC legal battle against Ripple has officially concluded, clearing a major regulatory hurdle that had previously weighed on XRP's institutional adoption prospects.[1]
